data.body: EPIC COMPLETE — all 6 children closed (S1 0b2b contract+harness; S2 1532 Engine A ctags resolver; S3 2554 T0 deps lane; S4 48d7 Engine B detectors; S5 3207 public oracle API+docs; S6 2529 conformance suite+eval) + 2 spikes. Shipped src/rebar/grounding/ (8 modules, all <800 LOC): a pure, fail-open, three-valued evidence oracle. Success criteria met: reusable internal API exposes the 3 jobs (refute-absence/applies/smell-scan) polyglot+fail-open returning the normalized evidence model; every wrapper fails open (unsupported-lang/missing-tool/crash/timeout/version-skew/invalid-detector → abstain+coverage, resolution lane only refuted/abstain never absent — PROVEN by the S6 conformance matrix, 6 backends x 7 modes, + measured 75.4% yield/0 false-refute on rebar's own source); detector registry (built-in + .rebar/detectors/ project-local, thin-envelope over OpenGrep+ast-grep+metrics, namespaced, quarantine-on-invalid); stable public oracle API + grounding-info read tool (lib/CLI/MCP, schema-registered) consumed by 5fd2/9da1 — one implementation. Optional [grounding] extra; core import-clean (non-adoption verified). 255 tests pass; mypy clean. 7 commits on main. Each story code-reviewed by a subagent + passed the completion-verification close gate (which caught a real AC5 gap in S4, since fixed). Closing.
